name: ragtime
description: RAG bake-off arena: compare embedding, rerank, and generation models via Render Workflows and OpenRouter

scripts.smoke: if [ -n "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" ]; then pnpm --filter @ragtime/gateway-openrouter smoke; else echo 'Skipping OpenRouter smoke (no OPENROUTER_API_KEY)'; fi && MODEL_GATEWAY=fake pnpm --filter @ragtime/gateway-fake smoke
